title: Software Engineer Role
applicationText: I am writing to express my strong interest in the Software Engineer position. Having spent the last two years optimizing high-traffic Node.js applications, I have developed a keen eye for performance bottlenecks. I don't just write code that works; I write code that scales and is easy for the next developer to read. My approach is always 'problem-first'—I find the most efficient tool for the job, whether that's a familiar JS framework or a new Python library.
jobDescription: Looking for a proactive developer who understands microservices and high-performance web apps.
